When Sacred Sanatana Universities Became Turushka Military Outposts: Bakhtiyar Khalji's Death Dance in Bengal and Bihar

# When Sacred Sanatana Universities Became Turushka Military Outposts: Bakhtiyar Khalji's Death Dance in Bengal and Bihar

### Buddhist primary sources narrate the tragic story of Bakhtiyar Khalji's annihilation of Bihar and Bengal. They make for agonising reading.

[](https://substack.com/@thedharmadispatch)

### [Read the Previous Episode](https://thedharmadispatch.substack.com/p/a-portrait-of-misery-bihar-and-bengal?s=w)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

BUDDHIST SOURCES REVEAL a comprehensive panorama of the barbarism of Bakhtiyar Khalji’s annihilation of this ancient, sacred *Dhamma* from the land of its own birth.

*An undertaking accomplished without analysis,  
Who would regard it as wise?  
After worms have eaten,  
Although a letter may appear, they are not skilled philosophers.*
